hero.badge: v1.0.8 — The Head Chef Release — Now Stable
hero.subtitle: Fresh translations, baked to perfection
hero.description: A lightweight, type-safe i18n library for React. Drop-in alternative to i18next with a clean plugin architecture, zero runtime dependencies, and delicious DX.

showcase.title: Live Showcase
showcase.desc: See every feature in action with interactive demos

docs.title: Documentation
docs.desc: Learn namespaces, file structure, and best practices

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.desc: Upcoming features with estimated release timelines

multi_lang.title: Multi-language Support
multi_lang.desc: 4 locales out of the box. CLDR pluralization for 100+ languages.

zero_deps.title: Zero Dependencies
zero_deps.desc: Core uses only native Web APIs. Tiny bundle size, maximum speed.

plugin_system.title: Plugin System
plugin_system.desc: NumberFormat, Capitalize, Custom backends, detectors & more.

type_safe.title: Type-Safe
type_safe.desc: Full TypeScript support. Strict key validation. Prototype pollution guard.

toml_json.title: TOML + JSON
toml_json.desc: Write translations in JSON or TOML. Zero-dep TOML parser built-in.

encryption.title: AES-256 Encryption
encryption.desc: Encrypt translation bundles at build time. Decrypt on-the-fly client-side.
